item.text: The proof blocker is not in Cargo or the selector logic. These tests create their temp project roots under `.vida/data/internal-codex/...`, which sits inside the repository tree, so `resolve_repo_root()` sees both the temp project root and the repo root and fails closed before any routing assertions run.

The harness itself already uses `env::temp_dir()`. The reason it landed under the repository is almost certainly a session `TMPDIR` override, so I’m trying the proof targets again with `TMPDIR=/tmp` to keep the temp project root outside the repo ancestry and avoid the unrelated ambiguity fault.
